case_title: PRISCILLA MARQUIS VS. SCOTT CARR ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $96.50) SERVED JAN-16-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WAZIRUDDIN, SARAH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2017 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARQUIS, PRISCILLA AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, SCOTT WAZIRUDDIN, SARAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $98.47) SERVED JAN-18-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARR, SCOTT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARQUIS, PRISCILLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAZIRUDDIN, SARAH $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $244.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,744.97, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST CLAIM AGAINST SCOTT CARR IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS IMPROPER (NO) SERVICE ON THAT DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WAZIRUDDIN, SARAH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRICILLA MARQUIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS SCOTT CARR AND SARAH WUZIRUDDIN ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RE: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
